variants.title: RHR165D10B
variants.option1Value: Filtrec RHR165N10B Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR165D10B
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RHR165N10B. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RHR165N10B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 60.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 34.2 mm, Length: 228.5 mm, Bypass Pressure: 3.0 BAR bar, Δ Collapse Pressure: 20 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 3.0 BAR, Collapse Pressure: 20 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: RHR165D10B
variants.option1Value: Hydac 0165 R 010 P/HC Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR165D10B
variants.description: Genuine Hydac 0165 R 010 P/HC Return Filter. Built to HYDAC’s OEM specifications and quality standards, this genuine part offers reliable performance, long service life and a precise fit. It’s suitable for a wide range of hydraulic and process applications, helping protect equipment, reduce downtime and maintain system cleanliness. For best results, match the part code to your equipment manual and verify key dimensions and ratings (size, connection, filtration grade/flow) before installation.
